description_long: This is a round, white ceramic plate featuring a colorful floral and fruit motif on its surface. The design includes two large yellow-orange fruits, several orange flowers, and green leaves, all rendered in a painterly style. The upper rim of the plate is inscribed with the phrase 'I am in PERLIS' in bold, black, hand-painted letters. The plate has a slightly scalloped edge, giving it a delicate, decorative appearance. The surface is glossy, reflecting light and enhancing the vibrancy of the painted design. There are no visible chips, cracks, or signs of wear, suggesting it is in excellent condition.
description: A glossy white ceramic plate with a vibrant orange floral and fruit design and the inscription 'I am in PERLIS' on the rim.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from a low angle, clearly showing the inscription 'I am in PERLIS' and the central floral and fruit design.
description_view_1: This view highlights the left side of the plate, with the orange flowers and green leaves more prominent and the inscription partially visible.
description_view_2: The plate is viewed from the opposite side, with the inscription appearing upside down and the fruit and flower design still visible.
description_view_3: The right side of the plate is shown, emphasizing the arrangement of the fruits and flowers, with the inscription curving along the rim.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Visible black inscription 'I am in PERLIS' on the rim and colorful floral and fruit patterns on the surface.
